rules.name: hardcoded-secret-values
rules.message: Possible hardcoded password, secret, or token in YAML value.
rules.fix_hint: Move secrets to a K8s Secret, ExternalSecret, or environment variable. Never store plaintext credentials in manifests or values files.

rules.name: privileged-container
rules.message: Privileged container grants full host access — breaks container isolation boundary.
rules.fix_hint: Remove privileged: true. Add only the specific Linux capabilities needed via securityContext.capabilities.add.

rules.name: latest-tag
rules.message: Image reference uses :latest tag — defeats reproducibility and prevents safe rollback.
rules.fix_hint: Pin to a specific version tag (semver or git SHA). Example: image: nginx:1.25.4 or image: myapp:abc1234

rules.name: hardcoded-replicas-without-hpa
rules.message: Hardcoded replica count — consider using HorizontalPodAutoscaler for dynamic scaling.
rules.fix_hint: If this deployment needs autoscaling, remove the static replicas field and configure an HPA resource instead.

rules.name: long-lines
rules.message: Line exceeds 200 characters — reduces readability and causes horizontal scrolling.
rules.fix_hint: Break long values using YAML multi-line scalars (| or >) or restructure the data.

rules.name: private-key-block
rules.message: Private key detected in source code
rules.fix_hint: Remove private key from source. Use key management service or environment variable.

rules.name: connection-string-credentials
rules.message: Connection string with embedded credentials detected
rules.fix_hint: Use environment variables for connection strings. Never embed passwords in URIs.

file_size._note: Lines of code. Helm values and K8s manifests can be verbose; 500 lines is a reasonable upper bound per file.

function_size._note: Not applicable to YAML files. Structural complexity is checked at Layer 2 by agent-based review.
